title: Celestial Ascension
description: Celestial Ascension introduces the mystical Celestite Ore, a rare and powerful resource found deep within the Overworld. This mod enhances your Minecraft experience by adding new crafting materials, tools, and mechanics better than Netherite.
body:
# Celestial Ascension 

**Celestial Ascension introduces the mystical Celestite Ore, a rare and powerful resource found deep within the Overworld. This mod enhances your Minecraft experience by adding new crafting materials, tools, and mechanics that surpass the capabilities of even Netherite.**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/8N-my_tyUHU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


## Key Features: 

**Celestite Ore:** 

- Appearance: Radiant blue ore with a celestial glow. 

- Location: Found exclusively below Y-level -8 in the Overworld. 

- Mining Requirements: Requires a Netherite pickaxe to mine. 

**Celestite Crystals:**

- Extraction: Extracted from Celestite Ore using a Diamond Chisel at a crafting table. 

- Uses: Used to craft powerful Celestite-Infused Netherite tools and armor. 

**Celestite-Infused Netherite Tools:**

- Celestite-Infused Netherite Pickaxe: Enhanced mining efficiency and durability, glowing softly as it reveals hidden treasures. 

- Celestite-Infused Netherite Axe: Superior chopping power and durability, perfect for both woodcutting and combat. 

- Celestite-Infused Netherite Shovel: Effortlessly cuts through soil, sand, and gravel with celestial ease. 

- Celestite-Infused Netherite Hoe: Transforms farming into a magical experience, boosting crop yields. 

- Celestite-Infused Netherite Sword: A formidable weapon, delivering enhanced damage with a touch of celestial magic. 

**Celestite-Infused Netherite Armor:**

- Superior Protection: Offers greater durability and defense than Netherite armor. 

- Gold level Enchantments: Has the same enchantment level as gold. 

**Celestite-Infused Netherite Block:** 

- Fusion of Strength and Magic: Combines Netherite’s resilience with Celestite’s celestial magic. 

- Unique Aura: Emits a unique aura, symbolizing the fusion of two of Minecraft’s most powerful elements. 

**Crafting and Upgrading:**

- Diamond Chisel: A precision tool used in a crafting table to convert Celestite Ore into Celestite Crystals. 

- Advanced Recipes: Crafting recipes requiring Celestite Crystals and Netherite items in smithing tables to create Celestite-Infused items. 

**Celestial Ascension brings a new layer of depth and excitement to your Minecraft adventures. Discover the power of Celestite and ascend to new heights with tools and armor that harness the magic of the cosmos.**
